## Summary

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool/feature
- [ ] Improvement to existing tool
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Follows code conventions (`spotify_{verb}_{noun}`, markdown returns, error format)
- [ ] Updated README tool count and table (if adding a tool)
- [ ] No credentials or secrets included
